items.title: Burkina Faso severs diplomatic ties with France, a sudden move with far-reaching consequences
items.summary: Captain Ibrahim Traoré announced on June 26 that Burkina Faso will break off bilateral relations with Paris. The 2,500 French nationals living in the country will no longer be able to rely on embassy or consular services, as staff are being repatriated.
